algorithmArn.note: When dependent op needs 'algorithmArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_batch_inference_jobs and set algorithmArn='{{ item.creationDateTime }}'

batchInferenceJobArn.note: When dependent op needs 'batchInferenceJobArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_batch_inference_jobs and set batchInferenceJobArn='{{ item.batchInferenceJobArn }}'

batchSegmentJobArn.note: When dependent op needs 'batchSegmentJobArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_batch_segment_jobs and set batchSegmentJobArn='{{ item.batchSegmentJobArn }}'

campaignArn.note: When dependent op needs 'campaignArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_campaigns and set campaignArn='{{ item.campaign }}'

dataDeletionJobArn.note: When dependent op needs 'dataDeletionJobArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_data_deletion_jobs and set dataDeletionJobArn='{{ item.dataDeletionJobArn }}'

datasetArn.note: When dependent op needs 'datasetArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_datasets and set datasetArn='{{ item.dataset }}'

datasetExportJobArn.note: When dependent op needs 'datasetExportJobArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_dataset_export_jobs and set datasetExportJobArn='{{ item.datasetExportJobArn }}'

datasetGroupArn.note: When dependent op needs 'datasetGroupArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_data_deletion_jobs and set datasetGroupArn='{{ item.datasetGroupArn }}'

datasetImportJobArn.note: When dependent op needs 'datasetImportJobArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_dataset_import_jobs and set datasetImportJobArn='{{ item.datasetImportJobArn }}'

eventTrackerArn.note: When dependent op needs 'eventTrackerArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_event_trackers and set eventTrackerArn='{{ item.eventTrackerArn }}'

filterArn.note: When dependent op needs 'filterArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_filters and set filterArn='{{ item.filter }}'

metricAttributionArn.note: When dependent op needs 'metricAttributionArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_metric_attributions and set metricAttributionArn='{{ item.metricAttributionArn }}'

recipeArn.note: When dependent op needs 'recipeArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_recipes and set recipeArn='{{ item.algorithm }}'

recommenderArn.note: When dependent op needs 'recommenderArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_recommenders and set recommenderArn='{{ item.latestRecommenderUpdate }}'

resourceArn.note: When dependent op needs 'resourceArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_tags_for_resource and set resourceArn='{{ item.tagKey }}'

schemaArn.note: When dependent op needs 'schemaArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_schemas and set schemaArn='{{ item.schema }}'

solutionArn.note: When dependent op needs 'solutionArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_solutions and set solutionArn='{{ item.autoMLResult }}'

solutionVersionArn.note: When dependent op needs 'solutionVersionArn' param, use for_each=aws.personalize.list_batch_inference_jobs and set solutionVersionArn='{{ item.solutionVersionArn }}'
